structural_claim: Macroscopic irreversibility emerges from reversible microscopic dynamics through statistical considerations

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Macroscopic irreversibility emerges from reversible microscopic dynamics through statistical considerations
Light-matter interaction becomes a reversible quantum process, demonstrating reversible microscopic dynamics that lead to irreversible macroscopic behavior through decoherence
Coherent quantum dynamics are fundamentally reversible but lead to irreversible behavior through environmental coupling
